_schema: Patti — the gossip surface. Director-authored text (2026-07-03), verbatim. The gossip node pulls from data/gossip.json: flagged banks (things YOU did) outrank general county talk.

intro.speaker: patti
intro.text: County's been talking. Question is whether they're talking good or talking interesting.
variants: You keep giving people stories and I'll keep serving pie.
Ash Creek runs on coffee and speculation.

gossip.speaker: patti
gossip.text: Word travels quicker than trucks around here.
